title: `Abdiy'el #5661
definition:
Abdiel = "servant of God"

 1) a Gadite, son of Guni and father of Ahi and one who settled in the
    land of Bashan in the time of king Jotham of Judah
nasbUsage:

 1) a Gadite, son of Guni and father of Ahi and one who settled in the
    land of Bashan in the time of king Jotham of Judah

    NASB:  servant of God, a Gadite
